changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "After the Festival"

TextENGNew: The tension in the station was palpable late that night.
In the hush, officers glanced back and forth between the clock and their phones, the suffocating minutes crawling by.
Kumagai-kun burst in with a young officer in tow.
changeReason: "Kumagaya" changed to "Kumagai" -- the standard romanization of 熊谷 for this character in the series.

TextENGNew: ``Ooishi-san, autopsy is underway! The old man just arrived too!!@k@vS20/19/443100016. I’m standing by and ready to go!!@k@vS20/19/443100017. I’ll head straight to the burn site!!``
changeReason: "Got the autopsy results" changed to "autopsy is underway" (検死入りました means the autopsy has begun, not that results are in); "court physician" changed to "old man" (じい様 is a respectful term for an elderly person).

TextENGNew: ``Kuma-chan, things have gotten a bit complicated. They’re saying the victim’s identity is extremely difficult to determine.``
``You don’t mean... like four years ago...?!``
``Nope.``
``Toasted to a nice golden brown, apparently.``
changeReason: New adds "apparently" reflecting だそうで (hearsay/reportedly) which the old translation omits; also fixes the missing opening quotation mark.

TextENGNew: His tone was flippant, but the implications were grave.
...A collective sigh escaped the officers.
``All the way? Head to toe...?``
``Burned to a crisp, they say. Poor guys at that scene.``
No personal belongings, burned beyond recognition.@kAnd dumped outside the prefecture, no less...
If things had gone badly, it could have taken a week to identify the body.
...Sniffing this out tonight was a major break.

``Right now, Komiyama-kun and his team are raiding every dentist in Okinomiya. Matching dental records is our only option.@k@vS20/11/440700126. ...Sorry!@k@vS20/11/440700127. Could someone run out and buy me a couple packs of strong cigarettes?``
changeReason: "The dentist" (singular) changed to "every dentist" -- 根こそぎ means thoroughly/all of them, indicating they are raiding multiple dentists in Okinomiya, not just one.

TextENGNew: A young officer answered and dashed out into the hallway.
``...This year, we actually found it. Impressive. ...You think maybe the people who disappeared in past years were killed and dumped outside the prefecture like this too?``
changeReason: "Scattered outside the prefecture" changed to "killed and dumped outside the prefecture" -- the Japanese says 県外で殺されてた (were killed outside the prefecture), not merely scattered.

TextENGNew: ``Then why not just bury them? Weigh the body down and toss it in the Sea of Japan or Lake Biwa—that would work just as well.``
changeReason: New includes 重り付けて (weigh the body down) which the old translation omits.

TextENGNew: ``...But still. ...Hasn’t the pattern always been one person dies and one person disappears?``

``Kuma-chan. The corpse was unrestrained inside an oil drum and burned. I suspect they killed the victim first and then deliberately set the body on fire.@k@vS20/11/440700130. They knew it would be found.``
changeReason: "Strangling" changed to "killed" -- シメる is slang for killing in general, not specifically strangling; new also adds "deliberately" (わざわざ) which the old omits.

TextENGNew: ``So... you’re saying they never intended to make anyone “disappear” this year?``
``It’s less that they didn’t intend to make someone disappear, and more that this is something else entirely. Far from hiding it, it almost feels like they were making a statement.``
``You mean... it was meant as a warning?``
He folded his arms... and then exhaled a long, pent-up sigh.
``If they’d done it within the city, that reading might hold.``
``...But by transporting the victim this far and burning them, there was a real chance it would never be linked back. If you wanted to send a message, you’d do it closer to Hinamizawa.``
changeReason: Old adds "alive" to "burning" which is not in the Japanese (焼く means burn, not burn alive); also "if they'd messed up" is an inaccurate rendering of 下手したら (worst case/if things went badly).

TextENGNew: ``...They want to assert that they killed, yet they chose a distant location where the dramatic impact is uncertain. Do they want to proclaim it or conceal it?@k@vS20/11/440700135. ...I do wonder what Oyashiro-sama has in mind this year~``
A ringing phone sliced through the heavy silence.@kA nearby officer snatched up the receiver.
``Ooishi-san! It’s Komiyama!!@k@vS20/00/KeijiA44002. We have a match!@k@vS20/00/KeijiA44003. A dental clinic in Okinomiya treated the victim’s wisdom tooth three years ago!!``
``What about the records?!``
``Complete with X-rays!``
``Well... I feel terrible dragging a dentist out of bed at this hour. Kuma-chan, head out the moment you get the records from Komiyama-kun.``
``Roger that!!``
``Oh, it’s the chief!! Thank you for coming in at this hour!``
``Ooishi-san, my apologies for the delay. What’s the situation?!``
``Hmm... let’s just say things are finally getting interesting. I’m all fired up!@k@vS20/11/440700139. Waa~o!``
